steps.title: Identify the defining clue
steps.content: The passage describes the excavation as involving “hard, physically tiring work” that lasts “weeks or even months.”

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: The target meaning is difficulty—hard, tiring, extended work is inherently demanding. 'Difficult' expresses this directly. Cheap is irrelevant, rapid contradicts the timeline, and common is never indicated. That matches choice D — D is correct.
